list_projects.description: Fetch a list of MPD projects / data sets

project_filters.description: Provides allowed filtering values for the /api/projects endpoint

project_dataset.description: Return the project's entire dataset of measured phenotype animal values

project_strains.description: List the strains that were tested in the project with attributes

project_publications.description: Fetch the publications associated with the project

project_markers.description: Fetch the markers that have been associated with the project

list_investigators.description: Fetch a list of contributing investigators

pheno_animal_vals.description: Fetch numeric individual animal data for MPD strain survey phenotype measure(s)

pheno_animal_vals_series.description: Fetch numeric individual animal data for the measure series

pheno_shared_animals.description: Verify if all measure IDs in measlist are for animal-granularity measures that could have some animals in common

pheno_lsmeans.description: Get model-adjusted least-square strain means for phenotype measure(s)

pheno_strain_means.description: Get unadjusted strain means for one or more MPD phenotype measures

pheno_measure_info.description: Get descriptions, units, and other metadata for one or more MPD measures

pheno_series_info.description: Get descriptions, units, and other metadata for the measure series

pheno_measures_by_ontology.description: Get measure IDs and metadata for all measures annotated to an ontology term or its descendants

limsdata.description: Get a list of all JaxLIMS procedures for which data is captured

limsdata_procedure.description: Get names and data types of all fields captured from JaxLIMS for a procedure

limsdata_measures.description: Get a list of accessioned MPD measures available for a procedure

limsdata_procedure_parameters.description: Get the JaxLIMS individual animal data for the given procedure and parameter(s)

limsdata_any_measnum.description: Get the JaxLIMS individual animal data for the given measure number

limsdata_komp_genotypes.description: Get info on strains/genotypes tested in KOMP

limsdata_kompeff.description: Get the precomputed effect sizes for one or more KOMP measures by measure ID

limsdata_kompeff_by_genotype.description: Get the precomputed effect sizes for all loaded KOMP measures for requested genotype_ids

snpdata.description: Retrieve rows from an MPD SNP dataset

geneinfo.description: Get basepair coordinates and other attributes for a mouse gene/marker

straininfo.description: See what info is available for a given mouse strain

generate_uuids.description: Generate one or more TCI JMUS 36-char unique identifiers (uuids)
